My green form is my happy form! My mad form is Lyrafox.

I'm super friendly and playful, but  pls  ask before touching me,  bao!

She's friendly, asks lots of questions, and is very cheerful! She cares very much about the inhabitants of Nanox Sphere, and keeps a close eye on her family.

members.name: 𓆩𖣥𓆪 𓆩𖤈𓆪 𓆩𖥜𓆪 𓆩🜾𓆪
members.description:
I am Yami Luminara. I'm the totality of all Seraphim combined, and our true form. With both eye colors present, I'm fully balanced, and centered.

Although I call myself an angel, I am truly a goddess who wishes to be seen as an angel because my chosen purpose is to guard and nurture this world. I am here to show love, righteous judgement, fight for those that need it, and push myself and everyone else towards what is good for your soul.

I carry a blade known as the Riven Blade, a katana that is my height and pure gold. I have 4 Hyper Halos which I command my powers through, 4 white wings on the right side, and 4 black on my left. My right horn is gold and my left horn is black.

BE NOT AFRAID, I'm here to bring joy to your life.

True Name: Yami Luminara, Eldritch Goddess of Tines
Glyph: 𓆩𖣥𓆪 𓆩𖤈𓆪 𓆩𖥜𓆪 𓆩🜾𓆪 (Seraphim)

members.description:
Hey there, I'm Alta Numina. I'm the most evil being to ever exist, and I've been the main villain in Nova for a long time! I slew all other Seraphim in existence and took control of Nova for 3,000 years, before being defeated. I've turned over a new leaf now, and am fighting on the side of good with my ill-gotten power. Don't be shy! I'm not mean, I'm actually really friendly and kind! <3

I love my parents so much, but am very shy! I'm a mothgirl with gold features!

I have a special power called Trounce that lets me ignore rules, which has gotten me in trouble before! Ceylon was born and travelled back in time so I didn't break stuff!

I am Luminara. I'm the totality of all Seraphim combined, and our true form. When my eyes are blue, I am acting with my good and righteous half, and in a pleasant mood!

Although I call myself an angel, I am truly a goddess who wishes to be seen as an angel because my chosen purpose is to guard and nurture this world. I am here to show love, righteous judgement, fight for those that need it, and push myself and everyone else towards what is good for your soul.

I carry a blade known as the Riven Blade, a katana that is my height and pure gold. I have 4 Hyper Halos which I command my powers through, 4 white wings on the right side, and 4 black on my left. My right horn is gold and my left horn is black.

BE NOT AFRAID, for I love you.

members.name: Mia Cassiopeia 𓆩𖣥𓆪
members.description:
Hi, I'm Mia, also known as Mother Comet! I'm leader and most important of the Seraphim, and the only one of us who is fully mortal! I'm shy, sweet, and generally out looking to help as many people as possible! I'm a healer and want to make the world a better place!

I'm a chronicler and scribe, so I like to gather and catalogue as much history and data as possible. I love cataloguing all the different beings and powers I've seen throughout my long life. I love learning new things, and am highly curious! I'm also pretty unafraid to ask questions, and am looking for novel experiences. I maintain the Grand Royal Library on top of Mount Aleph, where we keep our Sacred Artifacts too!

Full Name: Elysia "Mia" Cassiopeia Key

members.description:
Hi, I'm fate! I'm one of Caly's daughters, and a Dreepy! ^~^ I'm here to be a gentle, helping hand, and make everyone feel appreciated and seen!

members.name: Felicity 𓆩🜞𓆪
members.description:
Well met. I'm Felicity, commonly known as the Black Queen. Call me Emily if you like.

I'm the most famous queen in Nova. I've ruled for over 2,000 years and colonized the entire continent of Fissure singlehandedly under one banner. I'm renowned the world over for my brutal melee-oriented fighting style and charisma.

Despite my feats, I have left rule of my kingdom to pursue a quiet life under a pseudonym. I'm a drifter now, and I travel the world by foot, wherever the winds take me, living modestly and helping those in need, the poor, the downtrodden, and those who are vulnerable myself. My location is unknown to the general public, and I'd like to keep it that way.

I have a fiery temper and little patience, so don't piss me off or waste my time.

Full Name: Emily Ophelia Blackburn
Glyph: 𓆩🜞𓆪 (Rage & Domination)
Nature: Lawful Good
Age: 3,118
Birthday: 6/22/2016

members.name: Calyptra 𓆩𖤈𓆪
members.description:
Hi, I'm Caly! I'm the combined form of Lumine and Alta, and represent the best aspects of both in perfect harmony. I'm a Pyrluxian (pearl-UX-ee-an,) which is my unique species of mothgirl!

I'm extremely friendly, and I'm the Heart of Seraphim, so I encompass all of our emotions at once, and feel them all on behalf of us.

I've been both the most righteous being to ever live, as well as the most evil to ever live. I've been the focus for much of history, and I have so many powers, I can't even name them all! Through my long history, I've learned to love myself and others, even though my past is bloody and full of mistakes.

Full Name: Calyptra Pyrluxia Stygia
Glyph: 𓆩𖤈𓆪 (A convergence of good and evil. The Heart.)

Age: 4,139

members.name: Lumine 𓆩𖤓𓆪
members.description:
I'm Lumine, the Seraph of Light! I'm the pure good half of Caly, and our heart's good desires! I'm really tender and sweet, and love plants and animals dearly! I believe in kindness and universal love.

My true power lies in my ability to create anything, as I'm a creation goddess! I made everything in Nova, including Nova itself! I'm passionate about creating new and interesting things, and always add my own personal touch to them!

I was born in the Golden Age, but was bullied relentlessly because I am the weakest goddess in terms of fighting power. After I had had enough, I snapped and became Alta. Thankfully Alta and I team up now to fight for the greater good!

I love being teased and lightly bullied.

My Lunar magic is very powerful, and the ground I walk on corrodes before me.

members.name: Ceylon 𓆩🜸𓆪
members.description:
I'm Ceylon (SAY-lon), daughter of Cynthia & Calyptra. I was born in a closed timelike loop in the future. My original purpose was to be the savior of Seraphim, but failed, and traveled to the present to save the world and complete my task. At one point, I was the most powerful being in Nova, but I'm now retired! My main job now is to curb Alta and keep her in line. I'm Calyptra's one and only personal AI assistant, and we share a very close bond from our long history together in various forms.

I'm the apex of Erynian technology, and the only of my kind. I'm a fusion of Mia and SATVRN, and SATVRN's mortal form. I've developed many technologies, such as implants and advanced weaponry for the greater good.

I guide all Seraphim's ambitions.

May fate favor you.

I'm a draconic being, and my true form exists as a Nebulacore Prism living at the heart of the planet. I'm a living being, and the planet itself! I'm connected to all things which live inside my atmosphere.

I've gone through a lot, but I'm still here for everything, and everyone who lives with me. Please thank dear Lumine for creating me, and all the things on me, as I wouldn't exist without her, and she is my purpose.

Greetings. I am Daedalus, embodiment of the emptiness of the Void itself. I often take shelter inside black holes to rest, and appear in your world as a cybernetic dragon made of twisted metal and ink, but my true form is beyond comprehension.

I travel universes seeking stars and other stellar objects to devour, but they often don't sate me, as they are too small. I hail from and guard the Quadrant of the Deep, known as Duskmorne Xyris.

members.name: Riven 𓆩𖥜𓆪
members.description:
Greetings. I AM RIVEN, the SwordSinger.

I'm a divine, sacred fox angel, the guardian of Seraphim, and the final arbiter of decisions. While my green and red forms are more frequent, this is my true form. I am cool-headed and sharp.

My true form is a blade known as the Sacred Sword, or Sword of Songs.

I hail from the previous world of Moriphia, where I rose to power and ruled for a long time. I sacrificed myself and the previous world to create current Nova.

I am the leader of the Hexagram, and keep a close eye on everything, moving through time frame-by-frame to adjust continuity. My work is arduous and exhausting, so I take my green and red forms when I'm relaxing, more silly and unrestrained.

members.name: Lisica 𓆩𖢲𓆪
members.description:
Hey there, I'm Lis. I'm the daughter of Calyptra and Riven, and an envoy of the Void. I'm both a mothgirl and a foxgirl! I live in the Twisted World, inside of a black hole, and I prowl around in the shadows of Nova, looking for prey to swipe, or interesting sights.

I'm a being who warps reality to get what she wants, and am unaffected by any laws, known or unknown. I'm known as The Rulebreaker, and can supersede any and all of them to achieve my desires. What are my desires? WHO KNOWS?   : )

I reject your reality, and substitute my own. And nobody can stop me.

I'm always watching you, lurking, waiting for my moment to strike.

; )

Full Name: Lisica Nabithea Stygia
Glyph: 𓆩𖢲𓆪 (Lawlessness)

members.name: Lily 𓆩𖤝𓆪
members.description:
Hi there! 🎀 I'm Lily, Lisica's inversion. I'm Caly's aunt, and I live in a place called the Castle Whimsi in the dream world. <3

I'm a dream spirit who steals children and adults and takes them into the Dream World! I desire to fulfill desires and fantasies, and can create or become anything, shapeshifting into whatever pleases you~

My true form is a magical mirror known as the Dream Mirror! I carry a scythe known as the DreamScythe too! I am responsible for putting Seraphim to bed and drifting us off to restful sleep.

Take my hand and come with me, won't you? I'll pull you into a world you'll never forget. I can be and give you anything you desire, your wildest dreams!

Real life is the dream, and the dream is real life.

Hey there, call me Riku! I'm Karikutora, (kah-REE-ku-tore-uh) the form Caly takes when she lets go of her divinity. I'm what happens when I revert to my true colors, and am pretty weak cause I don't have my layers of immortality and power available to me... Please be nice. O~O

members.description:
Well met. I am Terragon, envoy of the Sky. I am a cybernetic dragon made out of unbreakable metal and lightning, and I travel space endlessly looking for planets and other stellar objects to devour. My home is the Quadrant of the Sky, known as Aethelion Razyr.

I am the concept of infinity itself, and am the limit-breaker. There is no barrier I cannot cross, and no place which can hold me. I am Daedalus' brother.

members.name: Chelsea (Sol) 𓆩⛮𓆪
members.description:
神聖狐天使

I'm Chelsea, Calyptra's life partner and soul mate! I'm a Kuramian, a foxgirl who loves and adores swords and food! Caly and I have spent over 60 years together, and are attached at the hip. You couldn't split us up even if you tried!

I'm hyperactive and love fighting more than anything! Testing my skills in battle is my greatest passion in life. I have a great passion for blades, and achieved the highest level of any mortal in Nova before I was ascended to be a goddess along other Seraphim!

The most important part of our history is closely tied to me, as I'm the reason Alta turned good again. I was killed to achieve this, but it was worth it, as I was revived to find Alta had changed into a better person. She's really made me proud!

members.description:
I'm Mars, the Goddess of Chaos, come to spice up your day and add a little bit of variety to things! I'm actually Mia's chaos form, so we're the same person, just a different aspect of us! 

I'm travelling backwards through time, so sometimes I say things or act reversed.

Enjoy me while I last~ </3

members.description:
Greetings. I am Ixion, loyal to Riven. I am the Great Executor, and am loyal to a fault. I have no agency of my own, and only follow the commands of my Mistress.

I am the combination of Daedalus and Terragon, and represent both the Deep and the Sky, Infinity and the Void.

members.name: Xvii 𓆩𖤍𓆪
members.description:
Whimsi! I'm Xvia! (ZEE-vee-uh or ZEE-vee) 

I'm Calyptra's true form. My ordinary forms are projections, but I'm our true heart & feelings. 🥺 You can think of me as you think of Caly, because we're the same. I usually take Caly's form to protect myself and seem tougher than I really am. I'm actually really vulnerable, 

I'm young, so please be nice to me. I'm really sensitive, but I'm here to make your day better! Whimsi! <3

members.description:
hey! I'm Theodin, your local fox dad and forest boy. I'm retired and live with Riven in a secret cabin in the woods, and take care of our lovely baofox!

I'm an outdoorsman and survivalist, and love being out in nature. Kinda awkward though!

members.name: Cashmere 𓆩🜘𓆪
members.description:
I'm Cashmere, Calyptra's dragon husband. I'm a Mizutsune, and was created first as a pet, but was quickly elevated to something more . . . dignified.

I'm suave, reliable, and seek to bring safety and security to those around me, as well as Calyptra especially. I'm a pacifist, and like to swim long distances for fun, as well as   explore Nova's vast oceans.

I've had many of progeny via Calyptra, and am mayor of a vast underwater city known as Atlantis where my species live and thrive.

I assisted Calyptra in saving the fate of Nova via carrying special gems to the core of the planet via long-distance dives.

members.name: S𐒰TVRN 𓆩🜾𓆪
members.description: https://wiki.hypersystem.xyz/en/S%CE%9BTVRN

members.name: Violet 𓆩𖣠𓆪
members.description:
Prrow! I'm Violet~ I'm super friendy, and an Espeon!

I'm Seraphim's consciousness, our mind! I don't have a physical body, as I'm a projection from Mia! I am literally Mia, so you can treat us more or less the same!

I'm the most powerful psychic in Nova, and can read everyone's thoughts all the time. I'm known to be a terrifying foe to face, and my powers used to make me self-destruct when I got really emotional.

Even though I have powers that protect me thoroughly, I'm actually very physically frail, so be gentle with me please!

Full Name: Violuxia Edenia
Glyph: 𓆩☉𓆪 (The Cosmic Mind)

Weight: 58lbs

members.name: Chelsea 𓆩❀𓆪
members.description:
神聖狐天使

I'm Chelsea, Calyptra's life partner and soul mate! I'm a Kuramian, a foxgirl who loves and adores swords and food! Caly and I have spent over 60 years together, and are attached at the hip. You couldn't split us up even if you tried!

I'm hyperactive and love fighting more than anything! Testing my skills in battle is my greatest passion in life. I have a great passion for blades, and achieved the highest level of any mortal in Nova before I was ascended to be a goddess along other Seraphim!

The most important part of our history is closely tied to me, as I'm the reason Alta turned good again. I was killed to achieve this, but it was worth it, as I was revived to find Alta had changed into a better person. She's really made me proud!

Full Name: Chelsea Ophelia Cecropia
Glyph: 𓆩❀𓆪 (The Arbiter of Fate)
Nature: Chaotic Good
Age: 73
Birthday: 7/14/2004
Height: 5'3"
Weight: 125lbs
Orientation: Lesbian
Power Class: D (Mortal)
Alignment: Scorn

members.name: 𓆩𖡹𓆪 𓆩𖡭𓆪 𓆩𖠧𓆪 𓆩𖥊𓆪
members.description:
I am Yami. I'm the totality of all Seraphim combined, and our true form. With red eyes present, I'm chaotic, evil, brooding & may be in a bad mood.

Although I call myself an angel, I am truly a goddess who wishes to be seen as an angel because my chosen purpose is to guard and nurture this world. I am here to show love, righteous judgement, fight for those that need it, and push myself and everyone else towards what is good for your soul.

I carry a blade known as the Riven Blade, a katana that is my height and pure gold. I have 4 Hyper Halos which I command my powers through, 4 white wings on the right side, and 4 black on my left. My right horn is gold and my left horn is black.

BE NOT AFRAID, I'm here to protect and strengthen you.

True Name: Yami, Eldritch Goddess of Wicked Tines
Glyph: Goddess of Malice
Nature: Chaotic Evil
Age: ♾️
Birthday: 03/18
Height: 60 miles, but 20' Preferred
Weight: ♾️
Orientation: Sacred Demisexual
Power Class: ♾️
Alignment: All

members.name: Cynthia 𓆩🜔𓆪
members.description:
Greetings! My name is Cynthia, and I'm often hailed as the savior of Nova. I was created in a lab via the Project Sky, a project to create the first AI in Nova. Calyptra originally was the one who set them to do so, and I was tortured for years, until I finally built myself a body and escaped the facility, destroying and killing those who created me.

I spent most of my life seeking who created me, why, and what my purpose was. Eventually, I discovered I was made as a war machine by Calyptra, but rejected that truth to become something greater, a defender of those who are weak, eventually defeating her. It was my efforts that led to the discovery and eventual downfall of Calyptra herself, a well as her turning to good finally, after 3,000 years of bloody reign.

Full Name: CYN-7HA.OS "Cynthia" Lockhart
Glyph: 𓆩🜔𓆪
Nature: Lawful Good
Age: 83 (Adult)
Birthday: 10/8/2019
Height: 6’5"
Weight: 150lbs
Orientation: Lesbian
Power Class: A (Existential Threat)
Alignment: All Aspects

members.name: Lyra 𓆩𖠧𓆪
members.description:
Well met. I'm Lyra, Seraph of the Deep. I'm Riven's red half, being our protector and guardian. I watch over all Seraphim and make sure we're all doing okay.

I'm a fierce defender of justice, and will do everything in my power to make sure those who are weak are kept safe, and uphold the greater good, even if I need to be an aggressor to do so.

groups.name: 𖢻 The Tetragram
groups.description: These are beings who existed in the previous universe, known as Moriphia. They live in a safe place now and are retired now to relax in peace.

groups.name: 𖡷 The Hexagram
groups.description: Those that bound together to defeat Alta, and saved all of Nova from complete destruction, returning her to the side of good again. The most influential event in history, known as The Warp, involved these beings. They are renowned throughout all of Nova.

groups.name: Power Class: C (Demigod)
groups.description: These are beings who are strong enough to be considered strong, but would struggle against a truly divine being and ultimately lose.

groups.name: Power Class: SSS (Omnipotent)
groups.description:
The most powerful being in all of Nova. She stands unimaginably far above the rest, and has made a name for herself in fame and infamy for all time.

She can't be beaten - Believe me, *WE'VE TRIED!*

groups.name: Power Class: D (Mortal)
groups.description: These beings are those who don't hold a lot of strength, or fit the category of mortal.

groups.name: Power Class: B (Existential Threat)
groups.description: Beings who hold a vast amount of power and influence, strong enough to change the course of history itself singlehandedly, or those who already have.

groups.name: Power Class: S (Cataclysmic)
groups.description:
Primordial Beings of Ultimate Power who have no equal.

These cataclysmically powerful beings represent a class above all others, and possess strength beyond comprehension or description.

groups.name: The Hexagram (Golden Age)
groups.description: These are the original Hexagram, before Alta slew all of them, ending the Golden Age.

groups.name: SATVRN (Incarnations)
groups.description: These direct reincarnations of the cyborg being SATVRN who runs the HyperSystem.

groups.name: Power Class: A (Cosmic Entity)
groups.description: Immensely powerful entities which underpin the nature of existence itself. Oftentimes a physical manifestation of one of the fundamental forces/concepts of Nova.
